achievement_board.title: Achievement Board
achievement_board.latest_unlock_empty_description: Log your next meal to start the board.
achievement_board.in_progress_hint: Focus on the next few wins.
achievement_board.no_active_description: You have cleared the active board for now.
achievement_board.secret_placeholder_description: Unlock it to reveal the details.

progression.level_up_description: You earned enough XP to reach the next level.

daily_log.title: Daily Log
daily_log.tap_to_toggle: Tap to {action} and send recalculation comment
daily_log.recalculate_placeholder: e.g. add avocado and olive oil

scanner.title: Add with AI
scanner.description_placeholder: E.g. Chicken salad, olive oil dressing, one slice of bread
scanner.uploaded_waiting: Image uploaded. Waiting for model queue.
scanner.succeeded: Scan finished. Open Daily Log to review, edit, and confirm.
scanner.camera_unavailable: Camera API is not available in this browser

messages.scan_draft_ready: AI draft is ready. Review it in Daily Log.

errors.scan_missing_init: Telegram init data is missing. Open this app from Telegram bot button.
errors.provider_auth_missing: OpenRouter API key is missing on backend
errors.provider_invalid_image: Image was rejected by model provider. Try another photo.
errors.provider_auth_invalid: OpenRouter key is invalid or expired
errors.provider_rate_limited: Rate limit reached, retry in a few seconds
errors.provider_connect_error: Network connect error from backend to OpenRouter
errors.provider_timeout: Model timeout, retry with another image
errors.provider_unknown_error: Unknown provider error. Retry with another image.

precise_edit.title: Precise Edit
precise_edit.description: Recalculate one AI result before confirming

sweet_truth.title: Sweet Truth
sweet_truth.description: Log something indulgent without hiding it

gourmet.title: Gourmet
gourmet.description: Log 5 different foods in one day

morning_magic_silver.title: Morning Magic
morning_magic_silver.description: Log breakfast before 10:00 on 2 days in a row

morning_magic_gold.title: Morning Magic
morning_magic_gold.description: Log breakfast before 10:00 on 3 days in a row

warm_streak_bronze.title: Warm Streak
warm_streak_bronze.description: Log meals 2 days in a row

warm_streak_silver.title: Warm Streak
warm_streak_silver.description: Log meals 4 days in a row

warm_streak_gold.title: Warm Streak
warm_streak_gold.description: Log meals 7 days in a row

calorie_sniper.title: Calorie Sniper
calorie_sniper.description: Finish a day within 20 kcal of your goal

back_in_game.title: Back in the Game
back_in_game.description: Return after skipping at least one day

weekend_hero.title: Weekend Hero
weekend_hero.description: Log 2 meals on both Saturday and Sunday

snack_master.title: Crunch Crunch
snack_master.description: Log a snack or build a day with 4 or more meals

holy_trinity.title: Holy Trinity
holy_trinity.description: Reach at least 75% of your protein, fat, and carbs goals in one day

meal_intervals.title: Intervals
meal_intervals.description: Log two meals 3 to 5 hours apart

thursday_checkpoint.title: Halfway There
thursday_checkpoint.description: Log at least 2 meals on a Thursday

hat_trick.title: Hat-trick
hat_trick.description: Stay in the 85-115% calorie corridor for 3 days in a row
